required_skills: Application Security and Secure Software Development Lifecycle
preferred_skills: Supply Chain Security and SBOM Management
Compliance Frameworks such as SOC 2, ISO 27001, and PCI-DSS
Hardware Security Modules and Key Management
responsibilities: Conduct comprehensive application penetration testing and code security reviews to identify OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities and business logic flaws before production release
Perform structured threat modeling sessions using STRIDE methodology on new system designs to surface attack surfaces and prescribe mitigating security controls
Integrate SAST, DAST, and software composition analysis tools into CI/CD pipelines to enforce automated security gates at every pull request and deployment stage
Design and enforce cloud security posture management policies using AWS Security Hub and Open Policy Agent to detect and auto-remediate misconfigured resources
Manage enterprise identity and access management infrastructure including SSO, MFA, privileged access management, and just-in-time access provisioning
Lead incident response activities including containment, forensic evidence collection, attacker attribution, and post-incident remediation reporting for security breaches
Develop and maintain security monitoring rules in Splunk or CrowdStrike to detect anomalous behaviors, lateral movement, and data exfiltration patterns in real time
Harden container and Kubernetes workloads by enforcing pod security standards, image scanning with Trivy, and runtime threat detection using Falco
Drive organization-wide security awareness by conducting phishing simulations, secure coding training sessions, and developer security champions program facilitation
Maintain compliance with regulatory frameworks including SOC 2, PCI-DSS, and ISO 27001 by designing controls, gathering evidence, and coordinating third-party audit engagements
